description: An item is being discontinued and needs to be marked down for clearance.

nodes.task_description: Identify the item to be put on clearance.

expected_outcome.value: The manager selects the correct product SKU.

nodes.task_description: In the pricing system, apply a 'Clearance' price status to the item and set the new, lower price.

expected_outcome.value: The item's price is updated in the central system.

nodes.task_description: Print new clearance price labels and have an associate re-ticket all units of the item on the sales floor.

expected_outcome.value: The item is correctly priced and signed for quick sale.
